data.body:
## Description

**What**: Spike to verify that UserPromptSubmit hooks registered in plugin.json fire reliably when the user submits a message containing /fix-bug or /dso:fix-bug.
**Why**: GitHub issue anthropics/claude-code#10225 reported intermittent failures for plugin-level UserPromptSubmit hooks. Before building the full enforcement hook (story 65ad-b88a), we must confirm the mechanism works.
**Scope**:
- IN: Register a minimal UserPromptSubmit hook in plugin.json, test with /fix-bug messages, document results
- OUT: Full enforcement logic, directive injection content

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a test hook registered in plugin.json UserPromptSubmit fires on messages containing /fix-bug and its stdout appears in agent context
  ← Satisfies: "A UserPromptSubmit hook registered in the plugin's plugin.json detects when the user's message contains /fix-bug"
- When this story is complete, the spike results are documented in a ticket comment with pass/fail and any workarounds needed
  ← Satisfies: "spike task must first verify that plugin-registered UserPromptSubmit hooks fire reliably"

## Considerations

- [Reliability] anthropics/claude-code#10225 reported intermittent failures — test multiple invocations, not just one
